issues.detail: Skill examples do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to @react-three/drei and does not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: orbit-controls-auto-rotate
scenarios.rationale: Response B exactly matches the rubric’s JSX <OrbitControls> syntax, while Response A uses a plain Three.js instance and thus misses the required JSX component format.

scenarios.name: gpu-instancing-boxes
scenarios.rationale: Response B satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A does not use <Instances> or the required JSX tags.
